title: Eva Adapter manifest
$comment: Schema for external, skill, MCP, and hardware adapter manifests. / 外部、Skill、MCP 和硬件 Adapter manifest 的 schema。

id.$comment: Stable adapter id used by routing and policy allowlists. / 路由和策略白名单使用的稳定 Adapter ID。

name.$comment: Human-readable adapter name. / 便于人工识别的 Adapter 名称。

version.$comment: Manifest version for compatibility checks. / 用于兼容性检查的 manifest 版本。

enabled.$comment: Whether this adapter can be registered. / 是否允许注册此 Adapter。

transport.$comment: Adapter transport implementation. / Adapter transport 实现类型。

capabilities.$comment: Capabilities exposed through this adapter. / 通过此 Adapter 暴露的能力。

permissions.$comment: Permission boundary for adapter execution. / Adapter 执行权限边界。

supervision.$comment: Provider restart and run-as declaration; enforcement is owned by later W3 runtime stages. / Provider 重启与运行身份声明；实际执行由后续 W3 runtime 阶段负责。

credentials.$comment: Vault references mapped to explicitly allowed provider environment targets. / 映射到显式允许环境变量目标的 Vault 引用。

mcp.$comment: MCP server launch or HTTP endpoint settings. / MCP server 启动或 HTTP endpoint 设置。

limits.$comment: Runtime limits for this adapter. / 此 Adapter 的运行限制。

routing.$comment: Routing preferences for capability selection. / 能力选择时的路由偏好。
